title: Swan SWKA18530BLK Townhouse Set of 3 Kitchen Storage Canisters for Tea, Coffee, and Sugar with Pull Chrome Handles, Airtight Lids, Colour Coated Iron and Chrome Accents, 1.6L, Black
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: CONTEMPORARY KITCHEN STORAGE: Combining practicality with a contemporary design, these 3 storage canisters are a perfect addition to any kitchen.
STORE YOUR EVERYDAY ITEMS: These canisters are a great multi-purpose storage solution so your teabags, coffee, sugar or other loose ingredients can be easily accessed from your worktop.
SPACIOUS 1.6 LITRE CAPACITY: Store large amounts of teabags, sugar, coffee and more, with airtight lids to lock in the freshness. These spacious canisters are perfect for busy households.
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Requires just a simple wipe with a cloth to clean and maintain the high quality finish.
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: These storage canisters come with a 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee with an additional 1 year when you register the product.
description: From the manufacturer With a strong British heritage dating back to the 1920s, Swan understand that the kitchen is the hub of activity and an integral part of home life. Designed at our UK headquarters Iconic cookware and appliances at affordable prices Designed to bring expression, style and functionality to the heart of the home Swan SWKA18530BLK Townhouse Set of 3 Kitchen Storage Canisters for Tea, Coffee, and Sugar with Pull Chrome Handles, Airtight Lids, 1.6L, Black Introduce the Swan Townhouse SWKA18530BLK set of 3 black storage canisters to your kitchen collection. Neatly store your tea, coffee, sugar or other loose ingredients for easy access on your worktop, with airtight lids to seal in the freshness. They feature simple mirror finish chrome pull up lids and spacious 1.6 litre capacities. The Swan Townhouse collection combines striking modern design with beautiful detailing in sleek finishes with coordinated colours. Set of 3 round kitchen storage canisters Stores tea, coffee, and sugar Textured matt finish with round loop stainless steel lids Simple pull mirror finish chrome lid Single canister capacity: Approx. 1.6L Wipe clean only Item size: H18.50 x W11 x D11cm Colour: Black STORE YOUR EVERYDAY ITEMS These canisters are a great multi-purpose storage solution so your teabags, coffee, sugar or other loose ingredients can be easily accessed from your worktop. EASY PULL UP LIDS The handle is made from sturdy colour coated iron and features simple mirror finish chrome pull lids for easily gripping and pulling the lids off. TOWNHOUSE COLLECTION Complimenting both traditional and modern kitchens, our Townhouse range features striking modern design with beautiful detailing in sleek finishes with coordinated colours.
